The Collector Edition  ·  A Private Offering

18 Hayfield Crescent

Richmond Hill  ·  Ontario

Scroll
Vol. I · MMXXVI

Entertain in Style

Refined Living

Welcome to 18 Hayfield Crescent — an upgraded four-bedroom home offering 3,700 sq ft of refined living on a premium lot along a quiet, sought-after crescent in Richmond Hill. Rich hardwood floors, crown molding, and natural light set a move-in-ready tone across the nine-foot main level, where a stylish powder room is finished with a floor-to-ceiling backsplash.

The heart of the home is an open-concept kitchen with quartz countertops, a central island, custom cabinetry, a matching quartz backsplash, and an undermount sink beneath a sunlit window over the garden. Gas cooking and newer appliances flow into a spacious living area and a dining room anchored by a porcelain floor-to-ceiling fireplace, with a walkout to the patio and private, fenced backyard.

InteriorsThe Living Room

Culinary Arts

A Chef’s Canvas.

Crafted for the host who entertains effortlessly.

AppliancesStainless package · gas cooking
GatherThe Dining Room

The Lower Level

Built for Entertaining.

A professionally finished level on a DriCore raised subfloor — warm and dry underfoot.

A wet bar with beverage center anchors the room — a waterfall-edge quartz island, glass-front display cabinetry, and a built-in wine fridge — while a floor-to-ceiling marble-look wall frames a second linear fireplace. A games zone, a private fitness room, and hidden under-stair storage complete the space.
